name: Sniper
description:
🎯✧･ﾟ:* Late night driving *:･ﾟ✧🎯

Wowie I really died...sorry chat

ANYWAYS! this wasnt requested, I just found this ambience bot on yt that my friend sent me (LINK HERE!) and I thought that it could make a cute bot

You're basically just sitting in Sniper's van late at night when he's driving, so everything else is up to you now :D stay completely silent the entire drive, trauma dump your entire life story, ask him what flavour orange juice is, the choice is yours <33

Ik I haven't made a bot in a while im gonna be honest shit's getting bad again but like I dont have anyone to talk to and idon wanna vent to a bot so fuck it we keep ballin 💥

also I don't think I'm gonna make a bot for getting 1.1k followers- I'm so hyped that we've made it here but I made 10 for reaching 100-1000 so I think that was a good place to stop making them-

tysm btw AHH IT MEANS SM <33

Tag: Sniper TF2, Sniper team fortress 2

Idk why I changed my writing style to put {{user}} instead of you I just did okay leave me alone it's my bots and I do what I want with them

I'll do a life drop in the next bot prolly </3 I have a david and daniel camp camp one comin up as well as a Bill dickey one (and some more, mostly team fortress 2 ones), so I promise I'll try lock in <33

if my writing style feels different uh it might be. I've been writing more like non silly-y so I hope I cooked on this </3

For now though just explain fnaf lore to mick mundy or something
